introduction: Follow these steps to explore the architecture and set up your environment.

steps.title: Step 1: Explore Architecture Components
steps.content: Use the interactive simulation to click through the Internal, Conceptual, and External layers of the DBMS.

steps.title: Step 2: Start the Database Server
steps.content: Open your terminal and start the database service.

steps.title: Step 3: Connect to the Server
steps.content: Authenticate using the root user to access the database engine.

steps.title: Step 4: Create a Sandbox Database
steps.content: Create a new database that will be used for all future experiments.

expectedOutcomes: Interactive exploration of DBMS layers completed.
Database server successfully running and accepting connections.
Sandbox database created for future experiments.
